query:
SELECT id, userId, type, amount, balanceAfter, reason, createdAt 
FROM wallet_ledger 
WHERE userId = 17 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 38MgGCfAkTTcdrf.ae1ad98e5b22 --database JYruXSQahvP3cr6rPdjNhA --execute SELECT id, userId, type, amount, balanceAfter, reason, createdAt 
FROM wallet_ledger 
WHERE userId = 17 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
